prompt: I opened settings.local.php and I can see there's a `migrate` key and also a `legacy_drupal` key. I'm not sure which one is our actual migration source. Can you figure out which one to use and verify it?

assertions.name: scans_settings_local_php
assertions.description: The response scans settings.local.php for non-default database keys

assertions.name: lists_both_candidates
assertions.description: The response lists both 'migrate' and 'legacy_drupal' as non-default keys found

assertions.name: asks_user_to_confirm
assertions.description: The response asks the user to confirm which key is the source, rather than guessing or proceeding automatically

assertions.name: tests_connectivity_after_confirmation
assertions.description: After identifying the key, the response runs a drush sql:query connectivity test using the confirmed key

assertions.name: uses_drush_not_mysql
assertions.description: The connectivity test uses 'drush sql:query' rather than a direct mysql command
